name: Guild screen renders with tuning controls

planSteps.description: The guild management screen (element #screen-guild) is visible
Three trait sliders are visible: bravery, greed, focus (inputs with data-testid trait-bravery, trait-greed, trait-focus)
Class selection cards are visible for knight, mage and priest (data-testid class-knight, class-mage, class-priest)
A deploy button is visible (data-testid deploy-solo)
